name: Amaretto Cheesecake with Apricot Glaze
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
Combine the graham wafer crumbs, chopped toasted almonds, blanched almonds, sugar, and melted butter. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
Filling:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Gradually add the sugar and flour, mixing until well blended.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, stirring just until combined.
4. Mix in the sour cream and amaretto di Saranno liqueur.
5. Pour the filling over the crust.
6. Bake in a 450°F oven for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for 1 hour.
8. Run a knife around the rim of the pan, then cool on a wire rack.
9. Chill completely before serving.
Glaze:
1. In a saucepan, warm the apricot jam and amaretto di Saranno liqueur until smooth.
2. Strain the mixture.
3. Pour the glaze over the chilled cheesecake, removing the sides of the pan.
4. Garnish if desired.
Makes 10-12 servings.
